changelog: New Accounting menu grouping Journal Entries, Vendor Bills and Customer Invoices
Full customer invoicing — invoice numbers, references, product lines, VAT and payment terms, posted straight to the ledger
Receive Goods and Create Bill now open as proper pop-up dialogs, and every pop-up animates smoothly
Approvers are emailed when a purchase order needs approval, and suppliers are emailed the order when you press Send to Supplier
Cancelling an already-approved purchase order now requires approver rights
